failures.description: Claim states 100 k bucket is measured directly by default, but the default eval entrypoint only measures up to 10 k directly; 100 k is extrapolated unless --max-events 100000 is passed.
failures.artifact_evidence: eval/reports/benchmarks/dss_v0.5_20260720T094006Z/dss295-latency-storage_aggregate.json shows measured_sizes='1000' and single-seed smoke config.
failures.resolution: Resolved by full run dss_v0.5_20260720T182139Z: 1 k/10 k/100 k measured directly with 3 seeds, 50 iterations, 5 warmup.

failures.description: DSS-297 citation_integrity gate failed: 0.7778 < 1.0 with 1 missing and 1 unexpected citation on the synthetic 9-case sample.
failures.resolution: Changed C22 status to 'failing' in claims_registry.yaml. The harness emits the failing gate in the artifact. Root cause under investigation.

failures.description: Claim states DSS-299 is evaluated across 5 seeds with CI95 on real HotpotQA/NarrativeQA data, but the published artifact is a 1-seed dry-run synthetic fallback.
failures.resolution: Resolved by full run dss_v0.5_20260720T182139Z: real HotpotQA/NarrativeQA, 50 samples/dataset, 5 seeds, skip_real_embedding=false.

failures.description: DSS-297 citation_integrity gate failed: 0.7778 < 1.0 with 1 missing and 1 unexpected citation on the synthetic 9-case sample.
